description: Caddy SEED framework: pre-PAUL ideation capture + graduate routing (6 slash commands)

script: if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'git clone failed. Ensure you are added as a collaborator to meetcaddy/seed and your git CLI is authenticated (run: gh auth login).' }
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Pop-Location; throw 'git checkout v0.1.0 SHA failed.' }

notes: SEED framework files installed to: $(scoop prefix caddy-seed)\share\caddy-seed\
To activate in %USERPROFILE%\.claude\, run the caddy-link helper:
Commands installed (type /seed: in Claude Code for the full menu):
/seed:tasks:graduate   promote idea to apps/ or workflows/
PREREQUISITE: requires GitHub collaborator access to meetcaddy/seed
(provisioned during Caddy onboarding) AND an authenticated git CLI
